title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE BACARRA NATIONAL COMPREHENSIVE HIGH SCHOOL - CADARATAN ANNEX LOCATED IN BARANGAY CADARATAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BACARRA, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE FROM THE BACARRA NATIONAL COMPREHENSIVE HIGH SCHOOL SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BACARRA, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE AND CONVERTING THE SAME INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE CADARATAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 6805 / 97 OG No. 3, 367 (Jan. 15, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8808, August 16, 2000 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE BACARRA NATIONAL COMPREHENSIVE HIGH SCHOOL - CADARATAN ANNEX LOCATED IN BARANGAY CADARATAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BACARRA, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE FROM THE BACARRA NATIONAL COMPREHENSIVE HIGH SCHOOL SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BACARRA, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE AND CONVERTING THE SAME INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE CADARATAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The existing

Bacarra

National Comprehensive

High School -

Cadaratan

Annex located in

Barangay

Cadaratan

,

Municipality of

Bacarra

,

Province of

Ilocos

Norte is hereby

separated from the

Bacarra

National Comprehensive High School

situated in the Municipality of

Bacarra

, Province of

Ilocos

Norte

and converted into an independent national

high school to be

known as the

Cadaratan

National High School.

SEC. 2.

The Department of Education, Culture and Sports

shall issue such rules and regulations as may be

necessary to

carry out the purpose of

this Act.

SEC. 3.

All personnel, records, assets and liabilities of

the

Bacarra

National Comprehensive High School -

Cadaratan

Annex

are hereby transferred to and

absorbed by the

Cadaratan

National

High School.

SEC. 4.

The amount necessary for the implementation of

this

Act shall be charged against the current year's appropriations

of the

Bacarra

National

High School -

Cadaratan

Annex.

Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for the

operation and

maintenance of the

Cadaratan

National High School shall be

included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 5.

This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

August 16

, 2000

.
